pages.text: As far as I know, the illagers' culinary skills are so dreadful that you'll only find bread and potatoes in their outposts (presumably their eyes are set solely on emeralds and soul energy, alas...) $(br)Yet, even among the illagers, there are those who yearn for fine cuisine.
According to rumors, the vizier in the woodland mansion has something precious hidden away—$(l)a cookbook from his homeland...
